code:
%%{FinTech_Ledger}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_Gate] --> Idle: App Start
    
    Idle --> Recording: Start Recording
    Recording --> Paused: Pause
    Paused --> Recording: Resume
    Recording --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Paused --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Saving --> Idle: Save Complete
    
    Idle --> Loading: Load Session
    Loading --> Ready: Session Loaded
    Ready --> Playing: Play
    Playing --> Paused2: Pause
    Paused2 --> Playing: Resume
    Playing --> Ready: Stop/Complete
    Ready --> Idle: Close Session
    
    state Recording {FinTech_Risk] --> Capturing
        Capturing --> Capturing: Packet Received
        Capturing --> BufferFull: Buffer Limit
        BufferFull --> Flushing: Auto-flush
        Flushing --> Capturing: Flush Complete
    }
    
    state Playing {FinTech_Risk] --> Emitting
        Emitting --> Waiting: Packet Emitted
        Waiting --> Emitting: Delay Complete
        Emitting --> [FinTech_Gate]: Last Packet
    }
    
    note right of Recording
        Captures:
        - Timestamp
        - Direction
        - Raw hex
        - Decoded JSON
        - Action name
    end note
    
    note right of Playing
        Replay Options:
        - Speed: 0.5x - 4x
        - Seek to position
        - Step forward/back
        - Filter by action
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech审计系统画一个状态图，核心是记录和回放两个主流程。入口是FinTech_Gate，启动后先进入Idle状态。
明白，Idle作为起始状态。那Recording和Playing是并列的两大分支吗？还是说有先后依赖？
是并列但互斥的。用户从Idle可以启动Recording进入录制，或者Load Session进入回放流程。录制内部还有子状态：Capturing持续抓包，Buffer满时触发Flushing自动刷盘，刷完回到Capturing。
好的，我先把主流程画出来：Idle到Recording的触发条件是Start Recording，录制中可以Pause到Paused状态，Resume回来。停止录制走Saving最终回到Idle。另一条线Idle→Loading→Ready，Ready之后可以Play进入Playing。
对，但Playing里也要能Pause，注意这里的Paused和录制那边的Paused是不同状态，我们叫Paused2避免混淆。Playing停止后回到Ready，关闭会话才回Idle。
Playing的子状态里，Emitting之后有个Waiting状态等延迟完成，这个Delay Complete是定时器触发的吗？还有Last Packet直接回到FinTech_Gate？
是的，Delay Complete是回放速度控制的延迟。Last Packet走完后确实回到FinTech_Gate表示回放结束。另外Recording那边需要加注释说明捕获的字段：Timestamp、Direction、Raw hex、Decoded JSON、Action name。Playing那边注释写回放选项：速度0.5x到4x、Seek定位、步进、按Action过滤。
完成。录制子状态里Capturing自循环处理Packet Received，BufferFull触发Auto-flush进入Flushing，刷完回Capturing。两条注释都加上了。整体结构：FinTech_Gate入口，Idle枢纽，Recording和Playing两大分支各自有独立的Pause机制，Saving和Close Session作为清理出口。
